title: Report on the proposed subsidy to Vivid Housing Limited for Victory Quay, Portsmouth by Homes England
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to Homes England concerning the proposed subsidy to Vivid Housing Limited.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of Homes England’s assessment of the compliance of its proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit Referral of the proposed subsidy to Vivid Housing Limited for Victory Quay, Portsmouth by Homes England. "
